ol.li: Counter (5 bits): Increments every 64s. Validates cookies within a 32-minute window.
Stateless Nature: No memory is allocated on the server between Step 4 and Step 5.
Hash Collision: 24 bits provides $2^{24}$ entropy; adequate for burst defense.

g.title: Incoming SYN packet with Client ISN
